jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates:
Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates!
